rule "R0"
salience -10
when
    $p0_0 : T2(f0 <= 5.0, f2 contains "alpha", f0 not in (-3.0, 0.5) || f1 not in ("a"), f3 == false)
then
    insert(new T3($p0_0.getF0()));
    modify($p0_0) { setF3(true), setF0(0.5) }
end
rule "R1"
salience -6
when
    $p1_0 : T2($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f0, f3 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T3(4.0));

    $p1_0.setF3(true);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(8, "a"));
    insert(new T3($p2_0.getF0()));
end
rule "R3"
when
    not T0(f1 == false, f1 != true)

end
rule "R4"
salience -9
when

end
rule "R5"
